journal_entry.reason: Accrue utility expense of $50. Debit Utilities expense to recognize the expense incurred; credit Accrued liabilities to record the obligation to pay.

output_debit_classifier.reason: The transaction records the accrual of a $50 utility bill. 'Accrue' means the expense is recognized in the current period even though payment has not yet been made. Under the accrual basis of accounting (IFRS), expenses are recognized when incurred, not when paid. This creates a debit to Utilities expense (increasing expense) and a credit to Accrued liabilities (increasing liability). No tax is mentioned in the transaction, so no tax lines are added.
